title: MIN 635 (M) Amendment 1 wellbeing at sea publications
body: "Notice to: Shipowners, masters, company safety officers, and seafarers  Introduction of two new wellbeing publications: Wellbeing at Sea: A Guide for Organisations Wellbeing at Sea: A Pocket Guide for Seafarers  To provide tailored, practical advice to improve wellbeing onboard through organisational policy and personal action These guides will be are available from TSO and the MCA This MIN should be read alongside the Code of Safe Working Practices for Merchant Seafarers and MIN 680  Expiry date: 23rd, October 2026 "
